name: Cucumber Tofu Dressing
recipeIngredient: 8 oz tofu (your choice, White Wave reduced-fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate 1 medium cucumber and squeeze out excess liquid. Stir into the tofu mixture.
2. Add a small amount of chopped fresh mint if available.
3. Let stand for a while so the flavors blend.
4. Whirl ingredients in blender until smooth.
